[3.2]  Context, resources, and concurrency  AUTOMATED  (1/1 automated)

Outstanding Requirements
[5.1]  REVIEW_ONLY  5.1.explain-security-plainly
    Security concepts SHOULD be explained in plain language.
    why: Plain-language quality is a writing judgement rather than a lint rule.
